column1: The teacher _________ that Lena hadn't done her homework.
When I __________ up yesterday, father had already gone to work.
Poor Oliver ______ unconscious on the spot where Sikes had left him.
Ron’s collection of coins was valuable as he _______ them since he was a schoolboy.
When Sam returned home we _______ that TV programme for a quarter of an hour already.
Bill’s coat and mittens were wet because he ______ snowballs with his friends in the yard.
He went to meet his friends after he _______ his homework.
Alice was late because she _______ the bus.
She went to the post-office after she ______ the letter.
